title: hieracium murorum subsp. proximum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. proximum is a rare subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Traditionally, Hieracium murorum subsp. proximum is prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, although specific preparation methods and dosages may vary depending on the region and intended use.
